parameters.jsCode: const proposal = $('Validate AI Proposal').first().json; const rows = Array.isArray(proposal.articles) ? proposal.articles : []; return rows.map((row) => ({ json: row }));
const proposal = $('Validate AI Proposal').first().json; const rows = Array.isArray(proposal.talents) ? proposal.talents : []; return rows.map((row) => ({ json: row }));
const proposal = $('Validate AI Proposal').first().json; const rows = Array.isArray(proposal.articleTalents) ? proposal.articleTalents : []; return rows.map((row) => ({ json: row }));
